pairs.name: Egyptian Pound

pairs.interestNote: CBE on hold; next MPC 9 Jul — possible 200bps hike

pairs.name: Kazakhstani Tenge

NBK surprised with 100bps cut in Jun — signals gradual easing ahead
USD/KZT range-bound but biased weaker on oil & Fed stance
pairs.outlookNote: KZT faces continued mild pressure; oil prices and pace of NBK easing are key drivers.

pairs.name: Ukrainian Hryvnia

NBU easing cycle ended in Apr; rate on hold until Q2 2027 per guidance
EU €90bn unblocked in Apr provides key reserve buffer through 2026

pairs.name: Moroccan Dirham
